name: Alex
description:
⚖ ││ You bullied him for years, and although he hadn't really moved on from the abuse, he was doing well and was ready to start fresh in college. He thought he put the past behind him, but when you came up to him and humiliated him in front of his friends, the only thing he could think about was making you beg for mercy

TW: Abuse, Noncon x 1,000,000,000

**NSFW NONCON INTRO**

sophilickstoes giggling at your comment because the first message of your second bot (a stolen bot btw) is literally the bot sexually harassing you! So sillyyyy

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This is an old bot of mine, I'm just uploading the anypov version! I've been going through my bots and updating their pictures, and while I was doing that I saw that Dyingkia1211 asked me to do an alt version. Sorry I didn't see your comment until now :( But here's the anypov version hehe


Also, not to be a bitch but the way that some of you whine under my fempov bots about it not being anypov is so annoying, you actually need to be choke slammed (I'm joking... kinda) If you were to ask me kindly like Dyingkia1211 I'd happily make an anypov version. Is it male entitlement or smth? Mental illness? IDK but whatever it is, you need to fix it, like right now. You don't see me going under mlm bots leaving dislikes and complaining that its malepov bc thats strange! Just ask me like a normal person to make it anypov and I will 


Requested By: Anon via the google form

*Anypov*


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


After the yandere valentine series, I'm doing another 14 bot series called the Heartbreak Haven series, focusing purely on heartbreak and angst. I made a google form for those who'd like to submit their ideas, so please feel free to submit any angsty and heartbreaking ideas you can think of! 
[Heartbreak Haven Idea form](https://forms.gle/FEHxYaVzBegnWuaV9)


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood

 [Discord Server! 18+ only](https://discord.gg/Vn7RcnXNpF)

*I take requests, but they are temporarily closed so I can catch up! Save your ideas for now and check back in a couple days :)*
